prompt: Our validation scores show project-alpha at 42%, but I don't know who's supposed to be fixing the failing journeys. Assign ownership so accountability is clear.
expected_output: User runs assign-ownership.sh with --project project-alpha --journey login-flow --owner alice for each failing journey. assign-ownership.sh appends to .vf/team/ownership.json. Next team-dashboard.sh run shows ownership column in table.
